name: Aurora Dairies Light
description: A calm, modern VS Code colour theme inspired by the Aurora Dairies visual identity. Features deep aurora-blue surfaces with cream foreground and pasture-green syntax accents, evoking dawn skies over Australian and New Zealand pasture-based dairy farms. Built and published by Lucid Labs on behalf of Aurora Dairies. All trademarks belong to their respective owners.
